description: Legal document in Arabic script. Perhaps a deed of sale of a property. On parchment. Fragment: the beginnings of ~10 lines are preserved in additional to two lines (witness signatures?) in the right margin. Mentions Sayyid al-Ahl and Abū Manṣūr the buyer (al-mushtarī). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
